user.title: Delta Solar Login
user.description: Enter your Delta Solar portal credentials. Your plants will be discovered automatically.

plant.title: Select Plant
plant.description: Multiple solar plants were found on your account. Select the one to add.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Delta Solar portal. Check your internet connection.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid email or password, or no plants found on this account.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This Delta Solar plant is already configured.
